work_unit: L-003 fix: 收窄 autonomous-loop.sh run_round 限流 grep
situation: audit-2026-07-01-002 (scripts module) 的 L-003 finding：run_round() 内 grep -qiE '402|429|quota[ _]?exceed|rate[ _]?limit|overloaded|insufficient' 过宽，会误匹配正常输出如 'line 429: insufficient coverage'，触发假阳性限流回退。派生 fix（priority 9，本审计周期最后一条 pending）。
action: 收窄 grep 为 '\b(402|429)\b|quota[ _]?(exceeded|limit)|rate[ _]?limit(ed)?'：保留 402/429 word-boundary 裸匹配（几乎只对应 HTTP 状态码）；quota/rate_limit 改为组合词防误中；移除 overloaded/insufficient 单词匹配。opt-worktree.sh 检测到 scripts/autonomous-loop.sh 在 public-interfaces.txt → direction-shift 开新 worktree opt-engine-shift-1782881018。commit 4b9d485。
outcome_evidence: git show HEAD in worktree confirms diff: -grep line with 6 alternates replaced by +narrowed grep with \b boundaries and combo-only quota/rate_limit; commit 4b9d485 pushed to origin/auto/opt-engine-shift-1782881018
next_suggestion: audit-cycle-state 所有 9 条 derived_fixes 现已全部派生（case-494~502），待人工 sanctioned-merge。下轮若仍 fix-in-progress 则跑 scout-scan 瞭望快照；若全部 merged/rejected 则 status→cycle-complete 触发下一轮全量审计（建议审 moni-backend 或 shizi，跳过已审 hooks/scripts）。
